title: Share project for the world with a password?
excerpt:
Is it possible share  my project only for visualization  (like gannt graphic) with someone than doens’t have a monday.com account? Maybe using for instance a password? 
Thank you in advance 
Best regards 
Paulo Brás

posts.author: pib (Paulo Brás)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible share my project only for visualization (like gannt graphic) with someone than doens’t have a monday.com account? Maybe using for instance a password?

Thank you in advance
Best regards
Paulo Brás

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Paulo,

Welcome to the community!

You can create a new table view and use the share settings to generate a sharable link that allows them to see but not modify the board.
Cheers,
Harsh
